params.name: Foucault Pendulum
params.description:
On Oct 25, 1851 AD, French physicist, Foucault demonstrates the Earth's rotation with this experiment.
The Foucault Pendulum was made by the French physicist, Foucault to demonstrate the rotation of the Earth. This single pendulum possesses great inertia and can swing for a long time. The bottom plate has a marking to indicate that its direction is constantly changing as the pendulum swings.
